spec.name: The End Of The Passageway
spec.description: The cave passageway ends abruptly here to the north in a large wooden door set into the stone walls. The craftsmanship is superb! You can also head back to the main passage to the west, where there seems to be more light than here. An echo from down the passage makes you wonder for a moment if you are being followed, but you see nothing there...

north.description: It is a sturdy wooden door.
